{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2022-37331", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-119", "name": "Improper Restriction of Operations within the Bounds of a Memory Buffer"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-787", "name": "Out-of-bounds Write"}], "description": "### Summary

A memory-safety vulnerability in Open Babel's Gaussian output parser
allowed an out-of-bounds write when reading a crafted input file.

### Details

The flaw was in the `coords_type` orientation parser inside the
Gaussian output reader. A malformed orientation block caused the
parser to write past the end of its destination buffer.

### Impact

Open Babel is a C++ library and CLI used to read and write chemistry
file formats; it is shipped by Linux distributions and embedded in
services that may parse untrusted input. Triggering this vulnerability
requires the victim to open a malicious Gaussian output file with the
`obabel` tool, the `OBConversion` API, or any of the language
bindings (Python, Ruby, Java, R, Perl, C#, PHP).

### Affected versions

All releases up to and including 3.1.1.

### Patched version

3.2.0 (released 2026-05-26).

### Patch

Fix commit: https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/commit/528c142f

A minimized reproducer for this CVE is checked in under
`test/files/fuzz_regress/` and is exercised on every CI build under
ASAN+UBSAN by the `fuzzregresstest` harness.

### Credit

Reported by Cisco TALOS.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00704, "percentile": 0.48799}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T17:44:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2022-37331"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T17:44:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/security/advisories/GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2022-37331", "https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel/commit/528c142f", "https://talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1672", "https://www.talosintelligence.com/vulnerability_reports/TALOS-2022-1672", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openbabel/openbabel/security-advisories/GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openbabel/openbabel", "summary": "Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in Gaussian coords_type orientation parser", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T17:44:03Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vr3p-gg26-45v9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openbabel"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Open Babel has out-of-bounds write in Gaussian coords_type orientation parser
